channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish by gates to old garage block, 21st May
item.description:
Rubbish accumulation by gates where garages have been demolished on Hylton St next to no 20. Has been reported twice & rejected as 'private land'. I have been tenant here for 26 years. It is outside my garden boundary. Ongoing fly tipping spot as long as I've lived here. We continually have to report this corner. Please fix my street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Looks bad, 21st May
item.description:
Could you ask Winkworth letting agency to remove it or fix it It doesn’t look good and it’s been like that for ages! Thanx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large 2 fooot by 3 foot pothole, 21st May
item.description:
Shallow but widening fast

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Connaught Gardens, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking causing unnecessary traffic congestion, 21st May
item.description:
Cars are regularly being parked in areas where parking is not permitted, causing traffic to build up unnecessarily and creating congestion for other road users. This issue happens frequently and appears to be ongoing. Vehicles are often blocking the normal flow of traffic, making it difficult for drivers to pass safely and efficiently. Enforcement officers should monitor this area more closely and take appropriate action to prevent repeated obstruction and disruption.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley near Holly Hedge Terrace, 21st May
item.description:
Shopping trolley left on railway bridge running between Courthill Road and Holly Hedge Terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courthill Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newlands NW1 3SJ, 21st May
item.description:
​To whom it may concern, ​I am writing to formally report an issue regarding a large, unmaintained tree located directly on the pavement outside the Newlands residential building. The tree has grown significantly out of control due to a lack of regular trimming, posing several immediate issues that require council attention: ​Obstruction of Windows and Light: The upper branches are overgrown to the point where they are directly pressing against and obstructing the windows of the lower-floor flats at Newlands, severely blocking natural daylight and potentially risking property damage during high winds. ​Risk of Property and Vehicle Damage: The tree is situated directly next to public parking bays and an electric vehicle charging point. Overhanging, heavy branches extend directly over parked cars. Without proper pruning, falling branches during inclement weather pose a high risk of causing costly damage to vehicles. ​Pedestrian and Environmental Hazard: The dense canopy is significantly overhanging the footpath and blocking natural light to the street below, which could impact pedestrian visibility and safety at night. ​As the tree is on public land and falls under the council's jurisdiction, I kindly request that your arboricultural team visits the site as soon as possible to assess the tree and carry out the necessary pruning and crown reduction. ​I look forward to your prompt response and confirmation of when this maintenance will be scheduled. ​Kind regards,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Varndell Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked black BMW causing obstruction, 21st May
item.description:
Black BMW illegally parked on the footway between 117a Courthill Road and the railway bridge. It is not in a designated parking space as the bollard is still raised. It is partially obstructing the access gate for the properties behind. Hazard for fire and other emergency services.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courthill Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside 2a pickford close again, 21st May
item.description:
This is the 4 time reporting different instances of flytipping in this location and some of this was there last time as well. The purple bin is dumped and people were dumping in it and now around it. The pallet the black bags etc all been there for weeks inc 2 previous reports. The root cause is having a biffa bin on the street wjen planning for 2a including gated bin storage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and branches sticking out into road, 21st May
item.description:
The tree that was cut down a few weeks ago is still too close to the road and might hit vehicles Please can this be tidied up so it’s not so close to the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and debris on woods side of the street opposite block 15-21, 21st May
item.description:
Litter on street/curb side from the woods entrance up on that side of the street to block 15-21
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castlecombe Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets and Polystyrene, 21st May
item.description:
Flytipping - and also pls note unbagged rubbish is being habitually put out by the occupiers of the flats at no 1 Garden Walk, as seen in photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Eastern Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fixings now digging into trunk and damaging tree, 21st May
item.description:
Tree fixings are now too tight given young tree has grown. They are digging into the bark and damaging the tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 21st May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chippenham Gardens, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Abandoned Car Parked for Several Months with no sign of owners, 21st May
item.description:
This car has been parked here for several months, its not owner by any of the residents near by and the owners have not been seen. It hasn't moved and Its causing congestion and parking issues. If its not registered to any property down St Edmunds Road it should be removed immediately

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Edmunds Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Pruning, 21st May
item.description:
Resident has called to report a tree located between 5 Croydon and Post office. This is overgrown and requires to be maintained. Please can this be looked into and for the tree to be pruned.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dead tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burgoyne Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Landscape areas on Kelly Avenue have not been taken care of for months, 21st May
item.description:
We have reported several times to take care of landscape areas of Kelly Avenue SE15 5GL several times in the past few months, but unfortunately nothing was done. Please urgently ask landscape team to clean and take care of landscape areas of Kelly Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29; 31, Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st May
item.description:
Mattress and a large amount of wood have been left on this ally or unnamed road please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reddy Road, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Damaged vehicle on Elibank Road, 21st May
item.description:
Car on Elibank Road looks like it has been in an accident and has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elibank Road, Eltham
